title: Genomics and Functional Genomics of Alzheimer's Disease.
author: Kamboh MI
content: S-EPMC9130391 PMC9130391 Genomics and Functional Genomics of Alzheimer's Disease. Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a complex and multifactorial neurodegenerative disease. Due to its long clinical course and lack of an effective treatment, AD has become a major public health problem in the USA
